name: Medium Dino Cupcake Birthday Gift Bag Blue/Green - Spritz™
description:
Add laughter to your gift-giving with this bright and cheery Large Dino Cupcake Vogue Bag from Spritz™. From birthdays to baby showers and more, this paper gift bag suits all your year-round gifting needs for any occasion. The cute graphic of a dinosaur eating a cupcake enhanced with a colorful backdrop lends a fun, prehistoric flair to your gift and celebration. Suitable for holding any large to medium-sized gifts, this gift bag comes with a blue ribbon handle for easy carrying and convenient use. Put the gift in this bag along with tissue paper and it's instantly ready for giving!

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment.
